title: Roasted Pepper and Manchego Tart
description: A simple and flavorful tart that combines the sweetness of roasted peppers with the richness of Manchego cheese.
instructions: Roll out the puff pastry to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
Transfer the pastry to a baking sheet.
Spread the sliced peppers over the center of the pastry, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Sprinkle the crumbled Manchego cheese over the peppers.
Drizzle the Spanish olive oil over the cheese.
Fold the edges of the pastry up over the filling, pressing gently to seal.
Brush the pastry with a little water and sprinkle with salt.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown and the cheese is melted.
Garnish with chopped parsley, if desired.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
